{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/44903767?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/PinkDraconian", "id": 44903767, "login": "PinkDraconian", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ0OTAzNzY3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/PinkDraconian", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-7346", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "### Summary
Any unauthenticated attacker can bypass the localhost restrictions posed by the application and utilize this to create arbitrary packages.

### Details
Any unauthenticated attacker can bypass the localhost restrictions posed by the application and utilize this to create arbitrary packages. This is done by changing the `Host` header to the value of `127.0.0.1:9666`.

### PoC
The application has middleware that prevents access to several routes by checking whether the `Host` header has a specific value. We bypassed this restriction.

https://github.com/pyload/pyload/blob/4159a1191ec4fe6d927e57a9c4bb8f54e16c381d/src/pyload/webui/app/blueprints/cnl_blueprint.py#L21-L36
```python
#: decorator
def local_check(func):
    @wraps(func)
    def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
        remote_addr = flask.request.environ.get("REMOTE_ADDR", "0")
        http_host = flask.request.environ.get("HTTP_HOST", "0")

        if remote_addr in ("127.0.0.1", "::ffff:127.0.0.1", "::1", "localhost") or http_host in (
            "127.0.0.1:9666",
            "[::1]:9666",
        ):
            return func(*args, **kwargs)
        else:
            return "Forbidden", 403

    return wrapper
```

Below we see that the '/flash/add' endpoint uses the middleware above.

https://github.com/pyload/pyload/blob/4159a1191ec4fe6d927e57a9c4bb8f54e16c381d/src/pyload/webui/app/blueprints/cnl_blueprint.py#L56-L58C11
```python
@bp.route("/flash/add", methods=["POST"], endpoint="add")
@local_check
def add():
```

Notice how we are not authorized to access this endpoint when sending a request.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/44903767/294935526-64217d91-c0d1-4d8f-963f-cedfa8dc9034.png)

However, if we set the `Host` header to be `127.0.0.1:9666`, we notice the request returns `success`.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/44903767/294933755-43ad3826-0e94-4ba5-acf0-48f11670cbc6.png)

Checking the front end as an admin, we now see that this did indeed succeed.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/44903767/294934431-5d024c75-59dc-47b6-8887-b14ae91e320f.png)

### Impact
An unauthenticated user can perform actions that should only be available to authenticated users.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00315, "percentile": 0.23521}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x698-5hjm-w2m5", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-07-08T21:36:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x698-5hjm-w2m5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x698-5hjm-w2m5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-7346"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2025-07-08T21:36:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pyload/pyload/security/advisories/GHSA-x698-5hjm-w2m5", "https://github.com/pyload/pyload/commit/f4e2d12416ba2dfac7b036d5c8d6dab5461b9840", "https://github.com/pyload/pyload/blob/4159a1191ec4fe6d927e57a9c4bb8f54e16c381d/src/pyload/webui/app/blueprints/cnl_blueprint.py#L21-L36", "https://github.com/pyload/pyload/blob/4159a1191ec4fe6d927e57a9c4bb8f54e16c381d/src/pyload/webui/app/blueprints/cnl_blueprint.py#L56-L58C11", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x698-5hjm-w2m5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pyload/pyload/security-advisories/GHSA-x698-5hjm-w2m5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pyload/pyload", "summary": "pyLoad is vulnerable to attacks that bypass localhost restrictions, enabling the creation of arbitrary packages", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-28T13:49:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x698-5hjm-w2m5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pyload-ng"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.5.0b3.dev88"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pyLoad is vulnerable to attacks that bypass localhost restrictions, enabling the creation of arbitrary packages
